t_ch: 我想去探探究竟，看看究竟是谁，出于什么目的，创造了那个地方。
t_en: I want to investigate and find out who exactly created that place and why.

t_ch: 你准备好出发的话，随时告诉我。
t_en: Let me know when you're ready to head out.

t_ch: 现在就走。
t_en: Let's go now.

t_ch: 再等我片刻。
t_en: Give me a moment.

t_ch: 我对那个「时间停滞在十五年前的教室」很在意。
t_en: I'm really curious about that "classroom frozen in time from fifteen years ago."

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你准备好出发的话，随时告诉我。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, just let me know when you're ready to head out.

t_ch: 现在就走。
t_en: Let's go now.

t_ch: 再等我片刻。
t_en: Give me a moment.

t_ch: 你们循原路再度前往那间诡异的黄昏教室。
t_en: You retrace your steps back to that eerie twilight classroom.

t_ch: 这儿…好像什么都没发生过。那些幽灵消失了。
t_en: This place... It's like nothing ever happened. The ghosts are gone.

t_ch: 当年到底发生了什么？
t_en: What exactly happened back then?

t_ch: 十五年前，上一次「幻月游戏」期间，我作为谒者参与了这场游戏。
t_en: Fifteen years ago, during the last Phantasmoon Games, I participated as a Supplicant.

t_ch: 我本以为，谒者们只要向人们展示足够壮丽的「奇迹」，就能赢得最终的胜利，觐见「欢愉」星神……
t_en: I once believed that all it took for a Supplicant to win was to show the people a magnificent "miracle," and then I'd have an audience with the Aeon of Elation...

t_ch: 那时候的我，多么天真可笑。并非所有人都想以展示美好的方式激起人们的愿力。
t_en: How foolish... how naive I was. Not everyone wants to obtain everyone's Wishpower in a positive way.

t_ch: 乐园历<unbreak>1984</unbreak>年7月<unbreak>22</unbreak>日，一名怀有巨大恶意的谒者踏入绘世学院……
t_en: On July <unbreak>22</unbreak>nd, year <unbreak>1984</unbreak> of the Arcadian Calendar, a Supplicant harboring immense malice stepped into Graphia Academy...

t_ch: 他杀害了二十二名放学后留校的学生，之后又一路来到鸽川区，造成了一百四十六名无辜市民死伤。
t_en: He slaughtered twenty-two students who had stayed behind after school, then went on to Dovebrook District, where one hundred and forty-six innocent civilians were either killed or wounded.

t_ch: 这个杀人魔就像一名恐怖的作画者，留下一路受害者的遗骸和签名般的杀人痕迹「绽放血手」。媒体称他为…「告死魔」。
t_en: That killer moved like a deranged artist, leaving corpses imprinting his signature mark... the Bloody Bloom. The media dubbed him... the Herald of Death.

t_ch: 这是一桩无法遗忘的悲剧。十五年前的「幻月游戏」，因此被人们称为「血涂游戏」……
t_en: It was a tragedy that the world could not forget. The Phantasmoon Games of that year came to be remembered as the "Bloodstained Games"...

t_ch: 许多人失去了自己的孩子，许多人失去了自己的至亲。
t_en: So many parents lost their children. So many people lost those dearest to them.

t_ch: 其中一名受害者，是我的女儿。我在归来后，亲眼目睹了埋葬她的墓冢。
t_en: One of the victims... was my very own daughter. Upon my return, I stood before the grave, where she was laid to rest.

t_ch: …她叫姬子。
t_en: ...Her name was Himeko.

t_ch: 什么？！
t_en: What!?

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 抱歉，请允许我自我介绍。我是隆介，绘世学院的现任校长。
t_en: Forgive me. Allow me to introduce myself. I am Ryusuke, the current dean of Graphia Academy.

t_ch: 所以，眼前这位顶着她名字的女士……
t_en: So, this lady who bears her name...

t_ch: …你到底是谁？
t_en: ...Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 十五年前，当我决心加入这场幻月游戏时，我的父亲不在我身边。
t_en: Fifteen years ago, when I made up my mind to join this Phantasmoon Games, my father wasn't with me.

t_ch: 在我与告死魔对抗，命悬一线的时刻，我的父亲依旧不知道在银河哪儿游荡。
t_en: Even as I fought for my life against the Herald of Death, my father was still off somewhere, wandering the cosmos.

t_ch: 严格来说，打从记事起，他在我成长过程中的存在感就像太空里的空气一样稀薄……
t_en: Strictly speaking, ever since I can remember, his presence in my life has been as thin as the air in space...

t_ch: 所以，眼前这位顶着他名字的先生，你又是谁？
t_en: So, I would ask you who bears his name, who exactly are you?

t_ch: 移动这个平台，就能上去了。
t_en: Move this platform, and you should be able to get up there.

t_ch: 姬子，图书馆在哪儿？
t_en: Himeko, where's the library?

t_ch: 我认得路…只是，希望这十五年里学校没翻修过校舍。
t_en: I know the way... I just hope they haven't renovated the academy in the past fifteen years.

t_ch: 列车组的人出现了！
t_en: The Express Crew is here!

t_ch: 请关注我的直播间！
t_en: Please follow my livestream channel!

t_ch: 请多多为火花大人点赞！
t_en: Please give Miss Sparxie lots of likes!

t_ch: 前面就是图书馆了。终于摆脱这些只知道直播的学生了……
t_en: The library's just up ahead. Finally, I can get away from all these livestream-obsessed students...

t_ch: 我们蕉了。
t_en: We're here, bana.

t_ch: 可是，我没看见「浪花」，也没发现「月亮」…
t_en: But I don't see any "waves" or "moon"...

t_ch: 你们是…？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 这…怎么可能？
t_en: But... how is this possible?

t_ch: 明天就是校庆日了
t_en: Tomorrow's the school's anniversary.

t_ch: 来帮我布置学校大堂吧
t_en: Come help me decorate the school hall!

t_ch: 你会来帮我的吧？
t_en: You'll help me, right?

t_ch: 要不要一起去天台吃个点心？
t_en: Wanna grab some snacks on the rooftop?

t_ch: 我说你们可别偷懒哦？
t_en: Hey, don't slack off, okay?

t_ch: 呀，大姐头你回来啦？
t_en: Yo, boss! You're back?

t_ch: 我们可是等你好久了。
t_en: We've been waiting for you forever.

t_ch: 姬子姐，你脸色好怪哦。
t_en: Boss Himeko, you look kinda pale.

t_ch: 怎么回事？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 大家猜猜，无名客会赢吗？
t_en: What does everyone think? Will the Nameless win?

t_ch: 谁能成为最终赢家，是火花大人还是星穹列车？请大家拭目以待！
t_en: Who will emerge victorious: Miss Sparxie or the Astral Express? Stay tuned to find out!

t_ch: 让我们一起为火花大人加油打Call！
t_en: Let's cheer for Miss Sparxie!

t_ch: 很遗憾，你们费尽心思准备的「浪花」……
t_en: Too bad that your carefully planned "Wave"...

t_ch: …无法扑灭这漫天的「火花」！
t_en: ...can't put out this sky full of "Sparxies"!

t_ch: 顺着网络，愿力将汇聚于此！
t_en: Through the network, Wishpower will converge here!

t_ch: 花粉们，给我好好修理{F#她}{M#他}！
t_en: Sparklies, teach {M#him}{F#her} a lesson!

t_ch: 进去吧你！
t_en: Get in there!

t_ch: 她把我拉到什么地方来了？
t_en: Where the heck did she drag me to?

t_ch: 爱花护花~绝不害怕！
t_en: Love the Sparx, guard the Sparx~ Never fear the dark!

t_ch: 这都什么破押韵…
t_en: What kind of trash rhyming is that...

t_ch: 恶意退散，火花璀璨！
t_en: Evil, take flight, Sparxie blazes bright!

t_ch: 你们…给我清醒一点啊！
t_en: You people... get a grip!

t_ch: 火花花！火花花！火花花！
t_en: Sparxicle! Sparxicle! Sparxicle!

t_ch: 知道厉害了吧！
t_en: Now you know what I'm capable of!

t_ch: 出征大胜利！
t_en: A glorious victory!

t_ch: 哼，区区无名客…
t_en: Hmph, a mere Nameless...

t_ch: 怎么可能对抗大家的爱嘛~
t_en: How could you resist everyone's love!

t_ch: 这么顽强？！
t_en: Still hanging on!?

t_ch: 大家…真的有好好保护火花花吗？
t_en: Did everyone... really take good care of Sparxicle?

t_ch: 我明白，大家尽力了…
t_en: I understand... everyone did their best...

t_ch: 家人们，给我用唾沫星子淹死{F#她}{M#他}！
t_en: Everyone, let's drown {M#him}{F#her} in our spit!

t_ch: 家人们，快带带节奏啊！
t_en: People, let's get the PR slander going!

t_ch: 为什么…明明得到了全网的支持！
t_en: Why... I had all of the internet behind me!

t_ch: 区区无名客…怎么可能压倒我的人气？
t_en: How could a mere Nameless surpass my popularity?

t_ch: 不是所有人都想成为你。
t_en: Not everyone wants to be you.

t_ch: 我会向他们展示…我的「欢愉」！
t_en: I'll show them... my Elation!

t_ch: 体育馆，真令人怀念啊……
t_en: The gym... I've missed this...

t_ch: 有段时间我特别羡慕那些同学在场上飞奔、挥洒汗水的样子。
t_en: There was a time when I really envied those classmates who could sprint across the field, giving it their all.

t_ch: 哎？这里不也是姬子姐的母校吗？
t_en: Huh? Isn't this Himeko's alma mater too?

t_ch: 难不成姬子姐上学时是远离体育馆的文静学生？
t_en: Don't tell me Himeko was the quiet type who stayed far away from the gym back in school?

t_ch: 也…不是那么回事啦，有这些感慨的我那时已经毕业了。
t_en: Not quite... I'd already graduated by the time I started feeling this way.

t_ch: 因为一些原因重回父亲的学校里承担工作……
t_en: Due to some circumstances, I went back to my father's school to work.

t_ch: 跳上去，应该能够到那只伊磨吉！
t_en: One good jump, and we should be able to reach that emoti!

t_ch: 火花大人交给我保管的碎片！你…不许拿走它！
t_en: Th—This fragment, Miss Sparxie gave it to me to guard! You... You can't have it!

t_ch: 哇呀呀——
t_en: Waaaaaaah...

t_ch: 火花花，加油！
t_en: Go, Sparxicle, go!

t_ch: 打倒冒牌火！打到冒牌火！
t_en: Take down the impostors! Take down the impostors!

t_ch: 你们住手，不要再打了啦！
t_en: Stop it, you two! No more fighting!

t_ch: 活下来的就是新火花！
t_en: The one who survives becomes the new Sparxie!

t_ch: 打！我要看到血流成河！
t_en: Fight! I want to see the rivers run red.

t_ch: 被制伏的学生在接受了你们的物理催眠疗法后，陷入了甜甜的睡眠，好好休息吧。
t_en: The subdued students have drifted off into a sweet, peaceful slumber after taking your physical hypnotherapy treatment. Rest up now.

t_ch: 无论如何用力，你也无法推开这扇大门。
t_en: No matter how hard you push, the door won't budge.

t_ch: 欢迎回到《乐园早知道》特别新闻栏目！我们将持续为您跟踪幻月游戏的进展——
t_en: Welcome back to the Arcadian Morning Report special edition! We continue to bring you updates on the Phantasmoon Games...

t_ch: 谒者火花宣称举行的「火花大会」在开启不到短短一小时后，匆匆落下了帷幕。
t_en: The "SparxiCon" hosted by Supplicant Sparxie came to an abrupt end less than an hour after it began.

t_ch: 在全网注视下，星穹列车的无名客与网络主播火花展开了一场精彩的战斗！
t_en: Under the watchful eyes of the entire network, the Nameless from the Astral Express went head-to-head with streamer Sparxie in a spectacular showdown!

t_ch: 我的天！我本以为在芮克导演的新作《圣杯/今晚留下来》里，{NICKNAME}的战斗场面全都是特效——现在看来，{F#她}{M#他}的实力没掺半点假！
t_en: Unbelievable! I used to think all of {NICKNAME}'s fight scenes in Director Reca's latest film Holy Grail: Stay Night were just special effects... Turns out {F#s}he's got real moves!

t_ch: 接下来本台将持续聚焦星穹列车的行动，并安排——
t_en: We'll continue following the Astral Express's activities and bring you...

t_ch: 插播一条紧急新闻！
t_en: Breaking news!

t_ch: 今天下午四时许，治安局在鸽川区帮派「共愿帮」的总部中发现大量尸体！死因疑似是帮派内讧导致的火并。
t_en: Around 4:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM today, the Security Bureau uncovered multiple corpses at the Synwish Syndicate's headquarters in Dovebrook District! Initial reports suggest violent infighting among gang members as the cause.

t_ch: 更让人震惊的是：现场还有一名公司人员遇害！根据调查确认，死者名为——
t_en: Even more shocking: an IPC employee was found dead at the scene! According to the investigation, the victim was identified as...

t_ch: 林登•斯科特……
t_en: Lyndon Skott...

t_ch: 林登•斯科特，<unbreak>34</unbreak>岁，战略投资部的外派专员。你认识他吗，不死途先生？
t_en: Lyndon Skott, age <unbreak>34</unbreak>. Field operative in the Strategic Investment Department. Ring any bells, Mr. Ashveil?

t_ch: 没见过。公司的人为什么会死在这儿？
t_en: Never heard of him. What was someone from the IPC doing here?

t_ch: 听说共愿帮最近得到了一张面具。也许这位斯科特先生是为了幻月游戏的事上门商谈，遭到了殃及。
t_en: Word is, the Synwish Syndicate recently got hold of a mask. Maybe Mr. Skott came to negotiate for the Phantasmoon Games, and got caught in the fallout.

t_ch: 很抱歉，打断了你手头的活儿，不死途先生。
t_en: Apologies for interrupting your work, Mr. Ashveil.

t_ch: 算不上「打断」，绘世学院的麻烦已经自行解决了。但这里……
t_en: Wouldn't call it an "interruption"... the mess at Graphia Academy cleared itself up. But this...

t_ch: 初步判断，头目池波、二号人物恶水在内的三十三名「共愿帮」成员，在同一时间段内遭人杀害。
t_en: Initial assessment: thirty-three Synwish Syndicate members — leader Polwave included, along with second-in-command Caustide — were murdered in the same time frame.

t_ch: …恶水。
t_en: ...Caustide.

t_ch: 死者身上有明显的外伤和骨折，还伴有大量失血。具体死因还要进一步鉴定才有结论。
t_en: The victims show clear signs of trauma and fractures, along with massive blood loss. Exact cause of death still pending further autopsy.

t_ch: 这些作画般的手印，我们俩应该都不陌生。
t_en: These stylized handprints... We both know what they mean.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「绽放血手」，会使用这签名般的杀人手法的，只有那个家伙……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Bloody Bloom." Only one person ever used that as their calling card...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「告死魔」又回来了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Herald of Death is back.</color>

t_ch: 你的怀疑并非没有道理，但那家伙已在五年前被处决了。
t_en: Your suspicion isn't without merit, but that guy was executed five years ago.

t_ch: 处决？谁见到了？有没有向全民直播他的死刑过程？
t_en: Executed? Who witnessed it? Was the execution broadcast to the public?

t_ch: 谁能保证他死了？谁又能保证他不是被你们放了出来，只为了掌控这场狗屁游戏？！
t_en: Who can prove he's dead? Who's to say you didn't let him out, to rig this entire game!?

t_ch: 你应该听说过这条规则，「一个人无法两次加入幻月游戏」。
t_en: You've heard the rule, haven't you? "No one can enter the Phantasmoon Games twice."

t_ch: 所以，我想给你一个忠告：不要让愤怒啃噬理智，那样对身体不好。
t_en: So let me give you a piece of advice: Don't let rage gnaw away at your reason. It's bad for your health.

t_ch: 案情信息都在卷宗里，干活吧。异常防御部的顾问费可不是白给的。
t_en: The case's info is in the dossier, get to work. The Department of Aberration Defense isn't paying us to bum around.

t_ch: 不久后，不死途来到鸽川边……
t_en: Soon after, Ashveil arrived at the banks of Dovebrook...

t_ch: 愤怒悄然在侦探心中燃起，鸽川的风也没法吹散萦绕在他鼻尖的血腥气味。
t_en: Rage sparked quietly in the detective's chest, and not even the wind from Dovebrook could dispel the metallic tang of blood clinging to his nose.

t_ch: 在听闻「共愿帮」得到面具时，侦探心中曾升起一丝不祥的预感。但他从未能料到，这竟然会是自己和一位朋友死别的征兆。
t_en: When he first heard the Synwish Syndicate had obtained the mask, a grim premonition stirred within him. But he never expected it to be the omen of a friend's death.

t_ch: 老白，他不再是我们的朋友了。
t_en: Mister N... He's no longer one of us.

t_ch: 他现在…只是一具尸体，一个被埋在报纸新闻里不起眼的名字。
t_en: Now he's... just a body, another nameless casualty buried beneath a headline.

t_ch: 人们在意的只有天上星辰的明灭，在意的永远是银河里大人物们生死相搏的壮绝故事。
t_en: People only care about the stars twinkling above, about the epic tales of the eternal conflicts among the cosmos's great figures.

t_ch: 和这些相比，一个小小帮派分子的死，又算得了什么呢？
t_en: Compared to all that, who would mourn a small-time thug from a petty gang?

t_ch: 接下来该怎么办？
t_en: What should we do next?

t_ch: …懒散了如此之久，我也该做个决定了。
t_en: ...I've been slacking off for far too long. It's time to make a choice.

t_ch: 不死途先生？这次拨来通话，我是否可以假定：你会接受我的提议。
t_en: Mr. Ashveil? If you're calling now, may I assume you've accepted my offer?

t_ch: 你说的没错，真珠小姐。
t_en: You are right, Miss Pearl.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我会加入「游戏」</color>——当然，是在你仍然需要我的前提下。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I'll join the games, assuming you still need me, of course.</color>

t_ch: 对你，我的提议始终有效。
t_en: My offer still stands.

t_ch: 与十五年前一样，幻月游戏再次出现了失控的征兆。不死途先生，还请你为导正这场星神游戏献出一份力量。
t_en: Just like fifteen years ago, the same omen returns. There are signs the Phantasmoon Games are spiraling out of control again. Mr. Ashveil, I ask for your strength to steer these Aeonic games back on course.

t_ch: 我能献出的，只有一颗复仇的心。
t_en: All I have to offer... is a heart set on revenge.

t_ch: 今天，三十三位二相乐园的居民和一名公司同仁死于非命…有人模仿「告死魔」的手段，试图染指这场游戏。
t_en: Today, thirty-three citizens of Planarcadia and one IPC colleague perished under mysterious circumstances... Someone is imitating the Herald of Death's methods, attempting to interfere with the games.

t_ch: 能告慰这些死者的，只有胜利。
t_en: Only victory can bring solace to the fallen.

t_ch: 不，能告慰死者的……
t_en: No, what consoles the dead...

t_ch: …唯有公义。
t_en: ...is only justice.

t_ch: 怎么，找到了更合适的代理人选？不考虑一下我吗？
t_en: What's the matter? Found a better candidate? Don't I even make the shortlist?

t_ch: 这是最善变的星神所划定的游戏，变化和意外是它的本质。我理应挑选最有能力的人加入这场游戏。
t_en: This is a game shaped by the most capricious Aeon, surprises and twists are its very nature. It's only right I choose the strongest players.

t_ch: 即便如此，我仍感到好奇：是什么让你十足确信——
t_en: Even so, I have to ask: what makes you so sure...

t_ch: 我会雇佣一名通缉重犯，作为代理人出战幻月游戏…而不是把你丢进公司的监狱里？
t_en: That I'd hire a wanted criminal to fight in the Phantasmoon Games... instead of tossing you into an IPC cell?

t_ch: 把我丢进监狱里？
t_en: Throw me in prison?

t_ch: 可是，战略投资部在匹诺康尼，明明冲着我们星核猎手抛出过橄榄枝啊？
t_en: But, the Strategic Investment Department in Penacony clearly extended an olive branch to us Stellaron Hunters, no?

t_ch: 你们改主意了？唉，生意人，翻脸真是比翻书还快。
t_en: Changed your minds already? Tsk. You suits sure turn faster than a page in a paperback.

t_ch: 直说了吧，<color=#dbc291ff>给我一张面具</color>。把它当作对我们的第一笔战略投资，如何？
t_en: So let's cut the fluff: <color=#dbc291ff>Give me a mask</color>. Call it your first strategic investment in us. What do you say?

t_ch: 先有理解，再有投资。回答问题：你想如何取信于我？
t_en: Understanding comes first. Then the investment. Tell me, how do you plan to earn my trust?

t_ch: 真是对不住。在来见你之前，我潜入过你的藏品室，知道你在研究什么…「幻造」——
t_en: Apologies in advance. Before I came to meet you, I broke into your collection room. I know what you've been working on... "Imagenate"...

t_ch: 对了，你听说过朋克洛德最伟大的骇客，最可怕的玩家「零号」吗？
t_en: Tell me, have you heard of Zero? Greatest hacker and most feared player in all of Punklorde?

t_ch: 看得出来，她给你们留下的心理阴影还挺重的。那你应该知道，「以太编辑」和「幻造」是系出同源的技术，或者…艺术。
t_en: It's obvious she left a deep impression on you... traumatic, even. In that case, you should also know that aether editing and imagenesis stem from the same technological source, or... art.

t_ch: 我知道，也研究过。
t_en: I know. I've studied it.

t_ch: 哈，我怎么把这个茬给忘了呢？你们偷走了「零号」的技术，做出了那个蹩脚游戏《以太战线》捞钱，又怎么会不知道这些呢……
t_en: Ha, how could I forget? You stole Zero's tech to make that lousy cash-grab game Aetherium Wars, of course you'd know all this...

t_ch: 不过你们这些公司的钱袋子永远也无法理解它——「欢愉」瞬息万变的力量。
t_en: But you corporate moneybags will never comprehend it, the fleeting, ever-changing power of the Elation.

t_ch: 成交，以太骇客。为了给这笔生意增添一些信心的保障，请允许我向你展示一点小小的骇客技巧。
t_en: Deal, aether hacker. And to seal it with confidence, let me show you a little trick of the trade.

t_ch: …骇客技巧？
t_en: ...A hacking trick?

t_ch: 泡在浴缸里和对手谈生意，可说不上尊重啊。
t_en: Not exactly professional, negotiating while soaked in a bathtub.

t_ch: 我取走了你的一个数据切片。这样有利于我们之间更真诚的沟通。
t_en: I took one of your data slices. This will help us have a more honest conversation.

t_ch: 你，怎么做到的……？
t_en: H—How did you do that...?

t_ch: 因为我研究过你，包括那场与天才螺丝咕姆之间的网络攻防战，我还登录过那被封禁的七十六个账号。
t_en: Because I've studied you, including that cyber battle between you and that genius Screwllum. I even logged into all seventy-six of those banned accounts.

t_ch: 是我在网络上布设了足够多的数据和档案任你翻看，引导你找到了那位不死神探。也是我允许你进入我的藏品室，随意游览。
t_en: I scattered just enough data breadcrumbs online for you to sniff out, leading you to the Ashen Detective. I even let you stroll through my collection room, to explore as you pleased.

t_ch: 银狼小姐，我有个建议：不要把这副面具当成石心十人对星核猎手的投资——
t_en: Miss Silver Wolf, a word of advice: Don't treat that mask like some Ten Stonehearts investment in a Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 把这笔生意当成是我和你的私人交易…就好。
t_en: Just think of this deal as something private... between you and me.

t_ch: 与此同时，幻月秘庭中……
t_en: Meanwhile, in the Phantasmoon Courtyard...

t_ch: 怎么回事？只不过一眨眼的工夫，突然就有那么多谒者戴上了面具。
t_en: What the heck? I just blinked and suddenly half the Supplicants are wearing masks.

t_ch: 一直期待这出戏能往好的方向发展。网络主播和银河英雄的碰撞，一番大战热热闹闹，论结果无人受伤，这不是很好吗？
t_en: I was hoping this show would get better. Streamers clashing with cosmic heroes, a flashy brawl, without anyone getting hurt. Wouldn't that have been nice?

t_ch: 但是现在，乌鸦、贝壳、猫咪、恶狼…来意不明的角色未免有些太多了吧？
t_en: But now we've got a crow, a shell, a cat, a wolf... how many more mystery guests are crashing this stage?

t_ch: 还有，这个东西…又是什么时候混进来的？
t_en: And this thing... when did it sneak in?

t_ch: 到最后，事情总会不可避免地滑向深渊啊。
t_en: In the end, everything always spirals into the abyss.

t_ch: 不过，你倒是个例外，作为「主角」，初出茅庐的第一仗打得不赖嘛。
t_en: But you're the rare exception. Your first battle wasn't bad for a greenhorn protagonist.

t_ch: 既然胜出了，你誓言中的劫数就这么一笔勾销吧。
t_en: Since you came out on top, let's wipe the slate clean on that doom-filled oath.

t_ch: 也不知道这些面具的主人，会成为你的对手还是盟友呢？
t_en: Who knows if the owners of those masks will become your friends or opponents?

t_ch: 还是说，他们中的某一个会带来我梦见的那个可怕的未来——
t_en: Or maybe, one of them will bring about that terrifying future I saw in my dreams...

t_ch: 小家伙，你是怎么找到这里的？
t_en: Little one, how'd you find your way here?

t_ch: 这次「幻月游戏」的谒者，还真让我感到意外啊！
t_en: The Supplicants in this Phantasmoon Games really caught me by surprise!

t_ch: 有人说她是「欢愉」的令使；有人说她进入迷思创造的「黑域」就跟回自家的后花园一样。
t_en: Some say she's an Emanator of Elation, while others say she enters the "Dark Zone" created by Mythus as if it were her own backyard.

t_ch: 她导致了朋克洛德的数据大雪崩，还感染了星际和平公司在二十八个星域的分部，导致彼此失联……
t_en: She caused Punklorde's data meltdown and infected IPC branches in twenty-eight segmenta, isolating them from each other...

t_ch: 关于「零号」的消息大都半真半假，和你们星核猎手何其相似。不过，有一条消息确凿无疑：「零号」栽了个大跟头，现在已经是公司的阶下囚了。
t_en: Most information about Zero is half true, half false, much like the rumors surrounding you Stellaron Hunters. But one thing is certain: Zero suffered a major downfall and is now a prisoner of the IPC.

t_ch: 「零号」曾更动过一个现实参数，创造出属于她的独立位面，就像那个……
t_en: Zero once tampered with a parameter of reality, creating an independent realm that belonged solely to her... just like that other one...

t_ch: …和绘世一样。
t_en: ...Just like Graphia.

t_ch: 你愿意交易「幻造」的秘密？
t_en: Are you willing to trade the secrets of imagenesis?

t_ch: 我可以考虑。
t_en: I can think about it.

t_ch: 推演：也许你在说谎。我听说：加入星核猎手的人早已放弃了旧日所行的命途。
t_en: Deduction: you may be lying. I've heard that those who join the Stellaron Hunters have long since abandoned the Path they once walked.

t_ch: 谁知道呢？踏上这座欢愉乐园，不碰一把运气，像话吗？
t_en: Who knows? You're in the arcadia of elation, wouldn't it be a waste not to test your luck?

t_ch: （客人？会是谁……）
t_en: (A guest? Wonder who it could be...)

t_ch: 这是我的提议，不妨考虑一下。
t_en: That's my proposal. There's no harm in giving it some thought.

t_ch: 我理解。但列车航行是为了开垦银轨，这点不会改变。
t_en: I understand. But the Express's voyages are meant to extend the silver rail. That won't change.

t_ch: 可银河形势会变。军团的威胁笼罩寰宇，谁都不能独善其身。「开拓」启程，不正是为了「连结」么？
t_en: But the cosmic situation will. The Legion's threat looms over the universe, and no one can avoid it. Isn't that why you started the Trailblazing journey? To "connect"?

t_ch: 事关列车航向，我不能擅自做主。
t_en: When it comes to the Express's course, I can't make any decisions on my own.

t_ch: 翡翠女士，你的橄榄枝，应该抛给所有人。
t_en: Madam Jade, your olive branch should be extended to everyone.

t_ch: 各位无名客，翁法罗斯的「救世主」，你们好。
t_en: Greetings, Nameless ones, "Deliverer" of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 趁着列车还没跃迁，我此番前来，是为庆祝胜利，也是为一项长期合作奠定基础——
t_en: I'm here to celebrate our victory before the Express makes its warp jump, and lay the groundwork for a long-term partnership...

t_ch: 谨代表战略投资部，我以「钻石」名义邀请各位前往<color=#dbc291ff>「千星城」</color>，共议结盟事宜。
t_en: On behalf of the Strategic Investment Department and in the name of "Diamond," I hereby invite all of you to <color=#dbc291ff>Astropolis</color> to discuss our alliance.

t_ch: 这就开始投资了？
t_en: We're jumping into investments this early?

t_ch: 不妨将它视作一份礼物：献给盟友的庆功宴，和一段恰到好处的假期。
t_en: Might as well think of it as a gift: a celebration feast for allies, and a well-deserved vacation.

t_ch: 千星城是哪儿？
t_en: Where's this Astropolis?

t_ch: 艾普瑟隆的明珠，{RUBY_B#IPC-E}「星际和平娱乐」{RUBY_E#}的总部。
t_en: It's the crown jewel of Epsilon, headquarters of Interastral Peace Entertainment.

t_ch: 论纸醉金迷，也许稍逊匹诺康尼。但在公司人眼里，它是最好的度假胜地。
t_en: It might not quite match Penacony in terms of glitz and glamour, but in the eyes of IPC folks, it's the ultimate vacation spot.

t_ch: 结盟事宜？
t_en: Our alliance?

t_ch: 战胜铁墓固然是足以载入史册的伟业，它属于银河，更属于无名客。
t_en: Defeating Irontomb is, of course, a feat worthy of being recorded in the history books. It's something that belongs to the cosmos, and even more so to the Nameless.

t_ch: 但你我都知道，这只是开始。要根除「毁灭」的威胁，仍需各方势力勠力同心。
t_en: But you and I both know this is just the beginning. To eliminate the threat of the Destruction, all forces must still unite as one.

t_ch: 为此，<color=#dbc291ff>「存护」希望联合「智识」、「巡猎」，成立「反毁灭同盟」</color>，团结一切能团结的力量。
t_en: To this end, <color=#dbc291ff>the Preservation hopes to join hands with the Erudition and the Hunt to establish an "Anti-Destruction Alliance,"</color> bringing together all forces that can be rallied to the cause.

t_ch: 很高兴，看来星穹列车也在名单上。
t_en: I'm glad to see the Astral Express is on the list.

t_ch: 你谦虚了。各位是击落绝灭大君的英雄，这面旗帜最耀眼的标识。
t_en: You're being too modest. You're heroes who defeated a Lord Ravager, and therefore the most brilliant emblem on this banner.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我想，「开拓」足以成为「领袖」的有力候选。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I believe the Trailblaze would make a strong candidate for leadership.</color>

t_ch: 真是受宠若惊啊。
t_en: I'm truly flattered.

t_ch: 把这一票当作「石心十人」的诚意吧。所以，我能有幸等到各位光临吗？
t_en: Consider our vote as a show of sincerity from the Ten Stonehearts. So, may I have the honor of expecting your presence?

t_ch: 列车停靠的每一站，都由全体乘客共同决定。翡翠女士，请给我们一点时间吧。
t_en: Every stop the Express makes is decided by all passengers together. Madam Jade, please give us some time.

t_ch: 当然，我会静候佳音。
t_en: Of course. Then I shall wait with anticipation.

t_ch: 星期日，我想听听你的直觉。
t_en: Sunday, what does your gut tell you?

t_ch: 以我对那位女士的了解，每一份人情都是为占有做出的铺垫。
t_en: From what I know about Madam Jade, every favor she does is just groundwork to put things in her control.

t_ch: 同感。公司甚至有意让列车牵头结盟……
t_en: I feel the same way. The IPC even wants the Express to spearhead an alliance...

t_ch: 多半是想利用我们。
t_en: They're probably trying to use us.

t_ch: 是想认「开拓」当老大。
t_en: They want to make the Trailblaze the boss.

t_ch: 恐怕另有目的。
t_en: I assume there's more to it than that.

t_ch: 按她的说法，公司将「开拓」视作一面旗帜。
t_en: According to her, the IPC sees the Trailblaze as something to rally behind.

t_ch: 借着银河联军战胜铁墓，由我们出面组织同盟，将反抗「毁灭」的势力整合到公司蓝图下…是一手好棋。
t_en: Riding on the Cosmic Alliance's victory over Irontomb, having us step up to organize an alliance and integrate the forces against the Destruction under the IPC's blueprint... That's quite a clever move.

t_ch: 个人建议，谨慎对待。即便成为名义上的「领袖」，我们也很难与公司周旋。
t_en: I suggest we proceed with caution. Even if we become the nominal "leaders," it won't be easy for us to outmaneuver the IPC.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你觉得呢？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

t_ch: 拒绝为妙。
t_en: Better say no.

t_ch: 你的顾虑是对的。列车有自己的路要走，加入政治游戏…还不是时候。
t_en: Your misgivings are valid. The Express has its own path to follow. It's not the right time to be getting involved in political games.

t_ch: 可以接受。
t_en: I'm okay with it.

t_ch: 对抗「毁灭」，我们需要更多盟友。
t_en: To fight the Destruction, we need more allies.

t_ch: 你说得对，朋友多多益善。但我担心这段友谊的代价，是「自由」。
t_en: You're right. The more friends, the better. But I'm worried that the cost of this friendship will be our "freedom."

t_ch: 公司的邀约，很可能是他们整合势力的开始…还是应当谨慎对待。
t_en: The IPC's invitation could be the beginning of their power consolidation... We should approach this with caution.

t_ch: 能去「星际和平娱乐」总部，还能当「反毁灭同盟」的盟主——
t_en: Getting to visit the Interastral Peace Entertainment headquarters AND become the leaders of the Anti-Destruction Alliance...

t_ch: 想也知道，哪有这种天上掉馅饼的好事？
t_en: Come on, when has anything that good ever just fallen into someone's lap?

t_ch: 翡翠是精明的商人。她口中的「领袖」，未必和我们的理解一致。
t_en: Jade is a shrewd businesswoman. Her idea of a "leader" might not align with what we have in mind.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
t_en: What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 拒绝为妙。
t_en: Better say no.

t_ch: 看。我就说{NICKNAME}也不会同意。
t_en: See? I told you {NICKNAME} wouldn't agree either.

t_ch: 这份责任太过沉重，就算合乎情理，也务必要谨慎。
t_en: This responsibility is too heavy to bear. Even if it makes sense, we must proceed with caution.

t_ch: 可以接受。
t_en: I'm okay with it.

t_ch: 为什么？说说理由。
t_en: Why? Mind telling us your reasons?

t_ch: 先答应着，走一步看一步。
t_en: We should agree for now and take things one step at a time.

t_ch: 你要这么说，倒也没错……
t_en: Well, you're not exactly wrong if you put it that way...

t_ch: 但最好还是别冒险。这份责任太过沉重，就算合乎情理，也务必要谨慎。
t_en: But it's still better not to take any risks. This responsibility is too heavy to bear. Even if it makes sense, we must proceed with caution.

t_ch: 何况，这有违列车自由人的身份。一旦接受，「开拓」的性质就截然不同了。
t_en: Besides, it goes against our identity as free people of the Express. Once we accept, the nature of the Trailblaze would completely change.

t_ch: 总之，先婉拒吧。
t_en: Anyway, we should politely decline for now.

t_ch: 过去列车一直保持中立。接受邀约，「开拓」的性质就截然不同了。
t_en: The Express has always maintained neutrality. By accepting this invitation, the Trailblaze would take on a completely different nature.

t_ch: 公司的邀请吗？必须谨慎考虑帕。
t_en: The IPC's invitation? We've gotta think this through carefully.

t_ch: 帕姆怎么看？
t_en: What do you think, Pom-Pom?

t_ch: 列车长会尊重每一位无名客的选择。但……
t_en: The conductor will respect every Nameless's choice. However...

t_ch: 重新启航后，我已经看见许多曾经中立的世界成了公司属地。
t_en: Since setting sail again, Pom-Pom's seen many once-neutral worlds become IPC territory.

t_ch: 翡翠的邀请，还是小心为妙帕。
t_en: Better be careful with Jade's invitation.

t_ch: 许多中立世界，如今都成了公司属地了。帕姆可不想列车也成为公司财产帕。
t_en: Many neutral worlds have now become IPC territories. Pom-Pom sure doesn't want the Express to become property of the IPC, too!

t_ch: 商议结束，来投票吧。我持保留意见。
t_en: The discussion's over, so let's take a vote. I reserve my judgment on this.

t_ch: 我的看法一致。
t_en: I feel the same way.

t_ch: 附议。
t_en: I second that.

t_ch: 加一。
t_en: Me too.

t_ch: 相信大家的判断。
t_en: I trust everyone's judgment.

t_ch: 我表达过意见了。
t_en: I've made my opinion clear.

t_ch: 我弃票。
t_en: I abstain.

t_ch: 经过慎重考虑，恕我们暂时无法接受你的提议。
t_en: After careful consideration, we regret to inform you that we cannot accept your proposal for the moment.

t_ch: 我猜，星期日先生也没有为我美言几句吧？
t_en: I don't suppose Mr. Sunday put in a good word for me, did he?

t_ch: 如你所见，星穹列车已经做出了选择。
t_en: As you can see, the Astral Express has made its choice.

t_ch: 但你似乎并不意外？
t_en: But somehow you don't seem surprised?

t_ch: 改变需要时间，我理解。姬子女士也说了：只是「暂时」。
t_en: Change takes time, I understand. As Miss Himeko said, it's just "for the moment."

t_ch: 不用立即给出答复。我擅长等待。
t_en: There's no need to give me an immediate answer. Patience is one of my strengths.

t_ch: 离开翁法罗斯后，列车会寻找一处文明世界进行补给。
t_en: After leaving Amphoreus, the Express will seek out a developed world to restock our supplies.

t_ch: 届时，欢迎战略投资部的盟友来列车上做客。
t_en: When that time comes, our allies from the Strategic Investment Department are welcome to visit us aboard the Express.

t_ch: 既然如此，我有另一桩提议。对姬子女士而言，也许更亲切……
t_en: In that case, I have another proposal. One that might be more... familiar to Miss Himeko...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>听说「二相乐园」的月亮，又满盈了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I hear the moon of Planarcadia is full again.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>想必姬子女士，会想回家看看？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I bet Miss Himeko would love to go home and see it, wouldn't you?</color>

t_ch: 回家…姬子的故乡？
t_en: Go home... Himeko's homeland?

t_ch: 是列车重新启程的地点？
t_en: Is that where the Express departed from anew?

t_ch: 又到了月圆的时刻了呀。那里应该一切安好吧？
t_en: So the moon is full once again. I wonder if all is well over there?

t_ch: 安定、繁荣，一切如常。如今，「二相乐园」已是公司重要的资产星球。
t_en: Stable and prosperous, as usual. Planarcadia has long since become one of the IPC's most valuable planetary assets.

t_ch: 虽然我不能亲身到访，但如果列车途经「二相乐园」，我的同僚一定会献上隆重的……
t_en: Although I cannot visit there in person, if the Express passes through Planarcadia, my colleagues will surely give you a grand...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>欢迎仪式</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Welcoming ceremony.</color>

t_ch: 那还真是有心了。我们会认真考虑。
t_en: That's very thoughtful of you. We'll give it serious consideration.

t_ch: 打扰各位这么久，该是我告辞的时候了。
t_en: Sorry for taking up so much of your time. I should get going now.

t_ch: 请记得，「千星城」的大门始终为星穹列车敞开。祝「开拓」之旅一路顺风。
t_en: Remember, the gates of Astropolis will always be open to the Astral Express. May the winds be favorable on your Trailblazing expedition.

t_ch: 「二相乐园」……
t_en: "Planarcadia"...

t_ch: 时隔十五年，又听见这个名字了帕。
t_en: It's been fifteen years since I last heard that name.

t_ch: 看得出，她是有备而来。「千星城」大概是个幌子，翡翠真正的目的，是来预告公司在我故乡的动作。
t_en: It's clear she came prepared. Astropolis was probably just a cover. Jade's real objective was to let us know about the IPC's movements in my homeland.

t_ch: 你打算回去看看么？
t_en: Are you planning to go back and check it out?

t_ch: 不妨先给迷惑的孩子们解释下吧？
t_en: Why don't we first explain things to these confused kids?

t_ch: 「二相乐园」哈托彼亚是我的故乡，也是星穹列车一度坠毁，并再度启程的地点。
t_en: The civilization of Planarcadia on Ahatopia is my homeland, and it's also where the Astral Express once crashed and set off again.

t_ch: 很少见你提起故乡…
t_en: It's rare to hear you talk about your homeland...

t_ch: 毕竟，我离开那里太久了。
t_en: Well, I've been away for so long.

t_ch: 其实，我也在犹豫。
t_en: To be honest, I'm also not quite sure about this.

t_ch: 丹恒、三月七，还有{NICKNAME}…翁法罗斯这一站，你们成长了太多，都是独当一面的无名客了。
t_en: Dan Heng, March 7th, and {NICKNAME}... You've all grown so much during your time in Amphoreus. Each of you has become a truly capable Nameless.

t_ch: 所以你们一定明白，翡翠说得没错，「开拓」对于银河的意义已经不同以往。
t_en: So you must understand that Jade was right. The Trailblaze no longer means what it once did for the cosmos.

t_ch: 是该继续漫游？还是像她提议的那样，成为对抗「毁灭」的中坚力量？
t_en: Do we keep wandering through space? Or, as she suggested, do we become a core force against the Destruction?

t_ch: 启程前，我们该认真思考这个问题。回到「开拓」重新出发的起点，不失为一种回首初心的方式。
t_en: We should give this question some serious thought before we depart. Going back to where the Trailblaze began again could be a way to reconnect with our original purpose.

t_ch: 当然，更重要的是，前一站太辛苦了，得好好放松才行。哈托彼亚是一座「欢愉」色彩浓厚的乐园世界，是个度假的好去处。
t_en: More importantly, our last stop was really exhausting, so we need to take a proper break. Ahatopia is an arcadian world steeped in the Elation, making it the perfect vacation spot.

t_ch: 如何？这是我的提议，不妨考虑一下。
t_en: So, what do you think? That's my suggestion. Give it some thought.

t_ch: 对了，黑天鹅没参与刚才的讨论，{NICKNAME}，能麻烦你将消息带给她吗？
t_en: Oh right, Black Swan wasn't part of our discussion earlier. {NICKNAME}, would you mind passing the message on to her?

t_ch: 你有没有发觉，谈到故乡时，姬子若有所思。
t_en: Have you noticed how Himeko gets lost in thought whenever we talk about her homeland?

t_ch: 本姑娘也算是列车八卦百晓生，唯独对姬子阿姐的过去一无所知。我也向杨叔打听过，他只告诉我：「杨叔也不知道喔」。
t_en: I'm like the Express's gossip queen, but when it comes to Himeko's past, I'm totally in the dark. I even asked Mr. Yang about it, but all he said was: "I don't know anything about this, either."

t_ch: 所以，我偷偷翻阅了航行日志，发现……
t_en: So, I snuck a peek at the navigation log and found...

t_ch: 列车日志不是谁都可以看吗？
t_en: Isn't the Express log already available for everyone to see?

t_ch: 哎呀，你的关注点错了！
t_en: Oh come on, you're missing the point here!

t_ch: 为什么要偷偷看？
t_en: Why are you sneaking peeks?

t_ch: 因为偷偷看，更刺激啊！
t_en: Because sneaking peeks makes it way more thrilling!

t_ch: 展开讲讲？
t_en: Care to elaborate?

t_ch: 我在日志里翻到，有个不认识的署名，叫「无量…」什么的。算算时间，应该是姬子认识的人。
t_en: I found an unfamiliar signature in the logs, something like "Mura..." Based on the timeline, it must be someone Himeko knew.

t_ch: 可她从没提起过。我猜，背后一定有什么大秘密。
t_en: But she's never mentioned it. I bet there's some big secret behind all this.

t_ch: 哈托彼亚，记得是个古老的世界。
t_en: Ahatopia... That's an ancient world, if I remember correctly.

t_ch: 你熟悉那儿吗？
t_en: Are you familiar with the place?

t_ch: 你想听智库的记录，还是我听说的传闻？
t_en: Would you like to hear the data bank records, or just the rumors I've heard?

t_ch: 读读智库。
t_en: Let's check the data bank.

t_ch: 「哈托彼亚位于失魂星域。在久远的过去，传闻『欢愉』星神阿哈曾在此驻足，令其成为假面愚者与悲悼伶人演出的舞台，也吸引了不同文明的旅者驻足。
t_en: "Ahatopia is located in the Consternation Starzone. It is said that in the distant past, the Aeon of Elation, Aha, once stopped here, turning it into a stage for the Masked Fools and Mourning Actors, and drawing travelers from many worlds."

t_ch: 「『毁灭』诞生后，此处也曾在军团的狂潮中濒临绝境——许多古老国度消逝，整个世界也一度沉入画中。
t_en: "After the Destruction came into being, this place too was driven to the brink by the Legion's onslaught. Many ancient nations vanished, and the entire world sank into a painted world upon canvas."

t_ch: 「所幸，在星际和平公司『诸世界重建计划』的扶持下，二相乐园自平面中归来，恢复了往日生机，并加入泛银河贸易网络，成为公司的重要资产与市场之一。
t_en: "Fortunately, with support from the Interastral Peace Corporation's 'Worlds Reborn Initiative,' Planarcadia emerged from the planar realm, regained its former vitality, joined the pan-cosmic trade network, and became one of the IPC's key assets and markets."

t_ch: 「如今，『二相乐园』所创造的一系列本土娱乐产品，在银河间广为流传……」
t_en: "As of today, an array of local entertainment creations originating from Planarcadia has circulated far and wide across the cosmos..."

t_ch: 怎么又是公司？
t_en: What, the IPC again?

t_ch: 这些信息是从公司的开源智库中拉取的，仅供参考。
t_en: This information is pulled from the IPC's open-source data bank, for reference only.

t_ch: 讲讲八卦。
t_en: Spill the tea.

t_ch: 离开仙舟后，我曾在公司船队待过一阵子，结识了一位来自这座乐园的愚者。
t_en: After leaving the Xianzhou, I spent some time with the IPC fleet, where I met a Fool from this arcadia.

t_ch: 她告诉我一则神话：「欢愉」阿哈曾在那里流下一滴眼泪，由此赐福了整个世界。
t_en: She told me a legend: Aha the Elation once shed a tear there, and thus bestowed a blessing upon the whole world.

t_ch: 欢愉星神…会流泪？
t_en: The Aeon of Elation... can cry?

t_ch: 很难想象吧？我也没法理解。不过愚者们的故事一向荒诞。
t_en: Hard to imagine, right? I can't wrap my head around it either. But the Fools' tales have always been absurd.

t_ch: 阿哈赐福的世界？
t_en: A world blessed by Aha?

t_ch: 很难想象吧？被「欢愉」赐福的世界，月亮都挂着笑脸。愚者们的故事一向荒诞。
t_en: Hard to imagine, right? In a world blessed by the Elation, even the moon wears a smile. The Fools' tales have always been absurd.

t_ch: 我没有其他问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 百闻不如一见，要了解这个奇异的世界，亲自拜访是最好的办法。
t_en: Seeing is believing. The best way to understand this peculiar world is to visit it ourselves.

t_ch: 谈及同盟时，翡翠女士只提到了战略投资部。
t_en: When discussing the Alliance, Madam Jade only mentioned the Strategic Investment Department.

t_ch: 也许，「反毁灭同盟」只是石心十人单方面的倡议。
t_en: Perhaps the "Anti-Destruction Alliance" is just the Ten Stonehearts' one-sided initiative.

t_ch: 他们不代表公司吗？
t_en: Don't they represent the IPC?

t_ch: 公司山头林立。如果我没猜错，名单里的派系都是「钻石」意图拉拢的势力。
t_en: The IPC is full of competing camps. If I'm not mistaken, all the factions on that list are forces that Diamond is trying to win over.

t_ch: 战略投资部需要足够多的砝码，好压倒公司内部的反对声音。
t_en: The Strategic Investment Department needs enough leverage to silence their opposition within the IPC.

t_ch: 这橄榄枝不好接。
t_en: Some olive branch.

t_ch: 如果真的回故乡。你心情如何？
t_en: How would you feel if we really went back to your homeland?

t_ch: 我？一切都好，只是有些感慨。
t_en: Me? Right now, I'm fine, just feeling a bit nostalgic.

t_ch: 翻了翻我写的第一篇航行日志，已经是十四万个系统时前的事了。
t_en: I was just flipping through my first navigation log. Can you believe that was from <unbreak>140,000</unbreak> system hours ago?

t_ch: 十五个自转年过去，「二相乐园」变成了什么样子？想想就令人好奇。
t_en: Fifteen orbital years have passed. I wonder what Planarcadia looks like now? Just the thought of it makes me curious.

t_ch: 能理解你的心情。
t_en: I understand how you feel.

t_ch: 这么久了啊…如果没遇上星穹列车，恐怕我还在四处流浪吧。
t_en: It's been so long... If I hadn't come across the Astral Express, I'd probably still be wandering around aimlessly.

t_ch: 不知不觉中，乘客也越来越多了帕。
t_en: Before Pom-Pom knew it, there were more and more passengers on board.

t_ch: 想听听你们的故事。
t_en: I'd love to hear all your stories.

t_ch: 以后会告诉你的。现在先准备跃迁吧。
t_en: I'll tell you about them another time. For now, let's prepare for the warp jump.

t_ch: 听说，你们对下一站有想法了。
t_en: I heard you have some ideas about the next stop.

t_ch: 刚才怎么没看见你？
t_en: Where were you just now?

t_ch: 你会跟我们一起吗？
t_en: Will you come with us?

t_ch: 抱歉，我和列车同行的日子…恐怕要告一段落了。
t_en: Sorry, but I'm afraid my journey with the Express... has come to an end.

t_ch: 忆者们收到忆庭的召集令，我必须回去复命。但这趟翁法罗斯之行，令我收获了许多难忘的「记忆」：各位的信赖，还有我对忆庭做出的小小背叛……
t_en: The Memokeepers have received summons from the Garden of Recollection, so I must return to report. But this journey through Amphoreus has given me many unforgettable memories: your trust, and my small act of rebellion against the Garden of Recollection...

t_ch: 要掩盖这些痕迹并不容易，所以我必须悄无声息地离开——还好，有位焚化工愿意帮忙，她正在等我。
t_en: Covering up these traces won't be easy, so I need to leave quietly. Fortunately, a Cremator has agreed to help me out, and she's waiting for me.

t_ch: 你要抹去我们的记忆吗？
t_en: Are you going to erase your memories with us?

t_ch: 怎么会？和你们共处的时光，是他处无从寻觅的珍宝。
t_en: Of course not! The time I've spent with all of you is a treasure I couldn't find anywhere else.

t_ch: 你还会回来吗？
t_en: Will you ever come back?

t_ch: 如果星穹列车需要一位忆者的帮助，我乐意效劳。
t_en: If the Astral Express ever needs a Memokeeper, I'll be glad to help.

t_ch: 想念时，就在脑海中轻轻呼唤我吧。如有必要…那位沉睡在三月七体内的「女士」知道该如何找到我。
t_en: When you miss me, gently call out to me in your thoughts. If needed... the "lady" slumbering within March 7th knows how to find me.

t_ch: 若我需要无名客的帮助，也会向各位发出请求。烦请代我向大家致歉，无法到场一一告别，请见谅。
t_en: If I need help from the Nameless, I will reach out to all of you. Please convey my apologies to everyone for not being able to say goodbye in person.

t_ch: 就此别过了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Farewell, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 有缘再见吧。
t_en: Until we meet again.

t_ch: 「二相乐园」…会有什么有趣的风景呢？
t_en: I wonder what interesting sights await us in Planarcadia?

t_ch: 黑天鹅离开了。
t_en: Black Swan has left.

t_ch: 什么？这就走了？怎么不招呼一声？我也想给她办个热热闹闹的饯别会啊？
t_en: What? She just left like that? Without even saying goodbye? I was thinking of throwing her a proper farewell party!

t_ch: 你向三月七讲述了黑天鹅离去的原因。
t_en: You explained to March 7th why Black Swan left.

t_ch: 黑天鹅为了帮助我们，甚至违背了忆庭的律令，不知这次召集，忆者们会不会为难她……
t_en: Black Swan went against the laws of the Garden of Recollection to help us. I wonder if the Memokeepers will give her a hard time at this gathering...

t_ch: 祝福她。
t_en: Wish her all the best.

t_ch: 如果需要，她会请求帮助。
t_en: She'll surely ask for help if she needs it.

t_ch: 确实，「记忆」行者都神通广大的很。希望这位姐姐的前路一切顺利。
t_en: Yeah, pathstriders of Remembrance are all really resourceful. I hope her path ahead is smooth.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，还在想下一站的事吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, still thinking about the next stop?

t_ch: 黑天鹅离开了。
t_en: Black Swan has left.

t_ch: 你向丹恒讲述了黑天鹅离去的原因。
t_en: You explained to Dan Heng why the Black Swan left.

t_ch: 是吗，如果她选择独自离去，想必有不得不这么做的理由。
t_en: Is that so? If she chose to leave on her own, she must have good reasons for doing so.

t_ch: 但愿翁法罗斯内部的事，流光忆庭无从得知。
t_en: I hope the Garden of Recollection has no way of knowing what happened inside Amphoreus.

t_ch: 「二相乐园」？又一个以「乐园」为名的世界……
t_en: Planarcadia, another land known as an "arcadia"...

t_ch: 黑天鹅离开了。
t_en: Black Swan has left.

t_ch: 你向星期日讲述了黑天鹅离去的原因。
t_en: You explained to Sunday why Black Swan left.

t_ch: 显然，铁墓的陨落震动了寰宇，连向来分散的忆者们也收到了召集令。
t_en: Clearly, the fall of Irontomb has sent shockwaves across the universe. Even the usually scattered Memokeepers have received a call to gather.

t_ch: 相信那位女士吧。她不是第一次在刀尖起舞，也不是第一次全身而退。
t_en: Trust the lady. She's no stranger to dancing on a knife's edge, and she's always made it out in one piece.

t_ch: 你向众人讲述了黑天鹅离去的消息。
t_en: You told everyone about Black Swan's departure.

t_ch: 如果没有黑天鹅，列车也无从抵达翁法罗斯，经历这趟前所未有的冒险。
t_en: Without Black Swan, the Express would have never made it to Amphoreus, let alone experience this unprecedented adventure.

t_ch: 不妨用铭记代替道别，期待再会的那一天。
t_en: Instead of treating this as a goodbye, why not cherish these memories and look forward to the day we meet again?

t_ch: 让列车长为她鸣笛一声，祝她的道路一片坦途帕！
t_en: Let the conductor sound a whistle for her and wish her smooth sailing ahead!

t_ch: 各位，商议得如何了？
t_en: So, what have you all decided?

t_ch: 我同意：去二相乐园！
t_en: I'm on board. Let's head to Planarcadia!

t_ch: 一场恶战结束，大家是该好好休息了。
t_en: After such a tough battle, we all deserve a good rest.

t_ch: 能去你的家乡看看，当然再好不过。
t_en: It would be wonderful to visit your homeland.

t_ch: 我没有异议。
t_en: I have no objections.

t_ch: 出发，二相乐园！
t_en: Let's go, off to Planarcadia!

t_ch: 既然大家意见一致，那么列车长，准备跃迁吧。
t_en: Since we're all in agreement, conductor, prepare for the warp jump.

t_ch: 各位乘客请注意——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
t_en: Attention, passengers. The Express is about to make the jump. Please be seated and hold on!

t_ch: 目标，「二相乐园」！出发！
t_en: Destination: Planarcadia! Let's go!

t_ch: 我又梦见了……
t_en: I dreamed it again...

t_ch: …真是个离谱的梦境，比那家伙许诺的还要夸张。
t_en: ...What a ridiculous dream, even more over-the-top than what that guy promised.

t_ch: 看来，列车又一次选择了错误的航线。
t_en: Looks like the Express has once again taken the wrong route.

t_ch: 但这也无可奈何啊…在光阴中，就算能将因与果分隔良久，但二者终将发生可怕的重逢。
t_en: But there's nothing we can do about it... In the river of time, if cause and effect can be kept apart for long, they're bound to have a terrifying reunion.

t_ch: 我说的没错吧，隔着重重帷幕窥视我等的…观测者？
t_en: Am I right, observer... watching us from behind countless veils?

t_ch: 戏才开场，我就自顾自说了这么多…你一定一头雾水吧？那就忘掉我刚才的胡言乱语。
t_en: I've been rambling on since the show just started... You must be totally lost, aren't you? Then just forget all that nonsense I was spouting.

t_ch: 这次竟然不是停靠在近地轨道，而是直接登陆吗？
t_en: So we're not just stopping in low orbit this time, but making a direct landing?

t_ch: 按照通信说法，官方准备了一座站台，专供星穹列车停靠。
t_en: According to the comms, the officials have prepared a dedicated platform for the Astral Express to dock.

t_ch: 一整座站台？只给我们停靠？这就是回乡的待遇吗？真有面子！
t_en: A whole platform? Just for us? Is this some kind of VIP treatment for coming home? Talk about rolling out the red carpet!

t_ch: 列车已入站。即将接入本地通讯——
t_en: The Express has arrived at the station. Connecting to local communications...

t_ch: 依我之见：星穹列车是银河中的传奇，准备一份恰如其分的礼物，合乎情理。
t_en: From what I see, the Astral Express is considered a legend across the cosmos, so preparing a fitting gift would be more than appropriate.

t_ch: 初次见面，鄙人真珠，隶属公司战略投资部。
t_en: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm Pearl from the IPC's Strategic Investment Department.

t_ch: 如今，我以这座乐园法人代表与首席执行官的身份：欢迎列车领航员姬子小姐荣归故里。
t_en: Now, in my capacity as the legal representative and CEO of this arcadia, I welcome the Express Navigator, Miss Himeko, back home.

t_ch: 真珠小姐，你好。没想到…如今是战略投资部接管了「二相乐园」。
t_en: Hello, Miss Pearl. This is news to me. I wasn't aware that the Strategic Investment Department had taken over administration of Planarcadia.

t_ch: 作为治理者，我正在学习。若能令这颗星球更加繁荣，我将深感荣幸。
t_en: As its governing official, I am still in the process of learning. If I can help this planet grow more prosperous, it would be a profound honor.

t_ch: 如果能与您当面交流，我们会更加荣幸。
t_en: We would be even more honored to have a face-to-face conversation with you.

t_ch: 这正是我想说的：列车停留期间，各位的要求，只要在合理范围内，公司会一应照办。包括你提出的这条。
t_en: That's exactly what I wanted to say: While the Express is stationed here, the IPC will reasonably accommodate all your requests, including the one you just mentioned.

t_ch: 说法不太妥帖，但我衷心希望：二相乐园能让各位流连忘返。
t_en: Pardon my choice of words, but I sincerely hope that you enjoy your time in Planarcadia so much you never want to leave.

t_ch: 既然如此，我想了解这个世界的近况。听翡翠女士说，又到月圆的时节了？
t_en: In that case, I'd like to know about recent events in this world. I heard from Madam Jade that it's once again the time of the full moon?

t_ch: 正是。我认为：它也在对列车表示欢迎。
t_en: Indeed. I believe it's also welcoming the Express.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>时隔十五年，随着「欢愉」的幻月再次满盈，「幻月游戏」总会如期开始。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>After fifteen years, now that the Phantasmoon of Elation is full again, the Phantasmoon Games will begin as scheduled.</color>

t_ch: 热热闹闹总是好的。这场神赐游戏进行期间，银河贵客们也会一一到访。
t_en: The more lively, the better! During these divine games, distinguished guests from across the cosmos will be stopping by.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这次与列车一同抵达的，还有仙舟联盟的使节。如果各位偶然遇见，请不要意外。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This time, along with the Express, a delegate from the Xianzhou Alliance has also arrived. Don't be surprised if you happen to run into them.</color>

t_ch: 仙舟使节？
t_en: A Xianzhou envoy?

t_ch: 没错。「玉阙」的大人物。
t_en: That's right. A big shot from the Yuque.

t_ch: 各位方才抵达，便不多叨扰了。我安排了接待人员在站台上等候，尽可随意吩咐。
t_en: Since you've just arrived, I won't keep you any longer. I've arranged for staff to wait for you at the platform. Feel free to ask them for anything you need.

t_ch: 上述一切，都是战略投资部对朋友的谢礼：祝愿各位能尽情享受。
t_en: All of this is a token of appreciation from the Strategic Investment Department to our friends. We hope you'll enjoy yourselves to the fullest.

t_ch: 这位女士…风格和砂金不同，手段却如出一辙。
t_en: Madam Pearl's style... is different from Aventurine's, but her methods are cut from the same cloth.

t_ch: 开门见山，干脆利落。看得出来，「列车不去千星城」早在他们的计划中。
t_en: Straight to the point, clean and decisive. It's obvious that "the Express not going to Astropolis" was part of their plan all along.

t_ch: 这样下去没完没了。为促成「反毁灭同盟」，真是不惜血本啊。
t_en: This could go on forever. They're really pulling out all the stops to form this "Anti-Destruction Alliance."

t_ch: 看来，有必要登门拜访一次，不管是了解这位首席执行官的目的，还是旗帜鲜明地拒绝他们。
t_en: Looks like we need to pay them a visit, whether to understand the CEO's intentions or to firmly reject their proposal.

t_ch: 至少在我的故乡，我们有更多回旋的余地。瓦尔特，和我一起？
t_en: At least in my homeland, we have more room to maneuver. Welt, care to join me?

t_ch: 结果还是闲不下来啊。
t_en: Looks like we don't get a vacation after all.

t_ch: 至于其他人，可以先自由行动。我的建议是：不妨四处逛逛，多了解下这个世界。
t_en: As for everyone else, you're free to do as you please. My suggestion is: Why not take a look around and get to know this world better?

t_ch: 这也是「开拓」的一站。
t_en: This is also a stop on our Trailblaze journey.

t_ch: 我也想一起去谈判。
t_en: I want to join the negotiations too.

t_ch: 难得你有这份心意，我心领了。但我有别的事想拜托你。
t_en: I appreciate your enthusiasm, really. But I have something else I'd like you to help me with.

t_ch: 既然这样，我和星期日去打听下仙舟使节的消息。
t_en: In that case, Sunday and I will go gather some intel about the Xianzhou envoy.

t_ch: 咦，为什么是你俩？
t_en: Huh? Why you two?

t_ch: 是我拜托丹恒带上我的。
t_en: I asked Dan Heng to bring me along.

t_ch: 碍于身份，我不便在公众场合露面。但我有种预感，列车或许要在复杂的形势下做出一些抉择。
t_en: I can't appear in public given my identity. But I have a feeling that the Express might need to make some tough decisions in these complicated circumstances.

t_ch: 如果能弄清仙舟联盟的态度，也许会对旅程有所帮助。
t_en: Understanding the Xianzhou Alliance's stance might help us on our journey.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，在翁法罗斯，你一直是最辛苦的那个。既然分头行动，不妨将自己的任务定为「陪三月好好休息」吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you had the toughest time in Amphoreus. Since we're splitting up, why not make your mission "take a break with March"?

t_ch: 我的心里话：交给你了。
t_en: I'm saying this from the bottom of my heart: I'm counting on you.

t_ch: 你也一样，三月。
t_en: Same goes for you, March.

t_ch: 哎呀，这下倒显得咱们两个不懂事的小娃娃游手好闲了。
t_en: Ugh, now we'll look like two immature kids just loafing around.

t_ch: 我已经是大人了。
t_en: I'm already a grown-up.

t_ch: 那你长得还挺快吼。
t_en: Wow, you grew up pretty fast then!

t_ch: 我还是个孩子啊。
t_en: I'm still just a kid.

t_ch: 你还挺得意哦？
t_en: Pretty proud of yourself, huh?

t_ch: 两位小朋友也不用烦恼。出发前，记得来观景车厢找我一趟。
t_en: Don't worry, you two. Just make sure to come see me in the Parlor Car before you leave.

t_ch: 我有件事要拜托你们。
t_en: I have a favor to ask of you both.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，小三月，你们来了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, March, you're here.

t_ch: 所以，是要给咱们什么任务吗？
t_en: So, what kind of mission do you have for us?

t_ch: 说来话长，如果我告诉你们，在银河的角落有一场「游戏」……
t_en: It's a long story, but what if I told you there was a "game" being played in a corner of the cosmos...

t_ch: 而胜出者有可能「成为星神」，你们会不会感兴趣？
t_en: And the winner might "become an Aeon"? Would that pique your interest?

t_ch: 还有这种事？
t_en: Wait, really?

t_ch: 还有这种好事？
t_en: Really? There's no catch?

t_ch: 你们也瞧见天上那轮特别的月亮了，对吧？
t_en: You two saw that special moon in the sky, didn't you?

t_ch: 那是一幅「画作」。在这里，每逢幻月满盈之时，名为<color=#dbc291ff>「幻月游戏」</color>的神赐仪式就会展开。
t_en: That's a piece of "artwork." Here, a ceremony called the <color=#dbc291ff>"Phantasmoon Games"</color> is held every full moon.

t_ch: 它就是我说的，让胜出者「成为星神」的游戏。
t_en: And that's what I was talking about, the game where the winner "becomes an Aeon."

t_ch: 真珠也提到了这个名字，到底什么仪式这么神奇？
t_en: Pearl mentioned that name too. Just what kind of ceremony could be so mystical?

t_ch: 在历史上，「幻月游戏」的起源和一群悲悼伶人有关。
t_en: Historically, the origin of the "Phantasmoon Games" is tied to a group of Mourning Actors.

t_ch: 据说，他们对着月亮献上打动人心的故事，以求得到谒见星神的机会。
t_en: Legend has it that they offered heartfelt stories to the moon, hoping for a chance to have an audience with an Aeon.

t_ch: 谒见星神很稀罕吗？
t_en: Is meeting an Aeon really that special?

t_ch: 并不。据我所知，许多派系都有「觐见」的手段。
t_en: Not really. As far as I know, many factions have their own ways of gaining an audience with THEM.

t_ch: 比如公司的旅游项目「琥珀王荣光一日游」。支付十八亿信用点，就可以在庇尔波因特的轨道飞船上近距离瞻仰克里珀。
t_en: Like the IPC's tourist package "One-Day Glory Tour of the Amber Lord." Pay <unbreak>1.8</unbreak> billion credits, and you can get a close-up view of Qlipoth from an orbital ship at Pier Point.

t_ch: 但「幻月游戏」不同，<color=#dbc291ff>它是少数有明确记载，能见到星神并得到回应的方式</color>。
t_en: But the Phantasmoon Games are different. <color=#dbc291ff>They're one of the few well-documented ways where you can actually see an Aeon and receive THEIR response</color>.

t_ch: 这位星神难道是…
t_en: Could this Aeon be...

t_ch: 「欢愉」阿哈。传说「幻月游戏」由祂亲手开启，而祂的目的众说纷纭。
t_en: Aha the Elation. Legend has it that THEY personally started the Phantasmoon Games, though THEIR motives remain a subject of much speculation.

t_ch: 在星神中，阿哈也是最「亲人」的那一类。祂留下的恶作剧数不胜数，哈托彼亚的神迹也是其中之一。
t_en: Aha is also one of the Aeons "closest" to humans. THEY have left behind countless pranks, with this miracle of Ahatopia being one of them.

t_ch: 「成为星神」是怎么回事？
t_en: What's the deal with "becoming an Aeon"?

t_ch: 史料记载，<color=#dbc291ff>从谒者中脱颖而出，「欢愉」便会垂迹，聆听胜者所求，并分享其权柄…一分钟</color>。
t_en: According to historical records, <color=#dbc291ff>when a Supplicant rises above the rest, the Elation will manifest, listen to the victor's wishes, and share THEIR authority... for one minute</color>.

t_ch: 考虑到这位星神曾将全部力量注入一只诺布莱斯虫，会这么做也不意外。
t_en: Considering this Aeon once injected all THEIR power into a Noblesse Worm, it's not surprising THEY would do something like this.

t_ch: 成为一分钟星神…意味着什么？
t_en: What does it mean... to become an Aeon for a minute?

t_ch: 历代胜者，有人追求极致的力量，有人渴望抹消过去的悔恨，甚至有人将这颗星球一并收入画卷中保存。
t_en: Among past winners, some sought ultimate power, some yearned to erase their past regrets, and someone even stored this planet within a scroll painting.

t_ch: 但他们的愿望如何被满足，结果又如何…只有流言蜚语，无人知晓真相。
t_en: But how their wishes were granted, and what became of them... only rumors remain, and no one knows the truth.

t_ch: 所以，我们要做什么？
t_en: So, what are we going to do?

t_ch: 列神之战初见端倪。我想，这也是公司在此处布局多年的原因。
t_en: The first signs of the war among the Aeons are beginning to show. I believe this is why the IPC has been positioning itself here for years.

t_ch: 看到幻月满盈时，我更确信了这点。觐见星神的仪式，无论真伪，都有可能成为左右银河命运的契机。
t_en: When I saw the Phantasmoon at its fullest, I became even more certain. This ceremony to commune with the Aeon, whether genuine or not, could be the turning point that determines the destiny of the cosmos.

t_ch: 瞩目这场游戏，有所企图的人，不会只有公司一派。接下来的路，恐怕暗流涌动。
t_en: With all eyes on these games, the IPC won't be the only ones with ulterior motives. The road ahead will likely be fraught with hidden dangers.

t_ch: 但重要的是，你们应当作出自己的决定。比如…是否，以及如何投身这场盛大的游戏。
t_en: But what's important is that you make your own decisions. Such as... whether you'll take part in these grand games, and if so, how.

t_ch: 我只有一项任务交给两位：以你们自己的方式，去见识、了解这个世界——「开拓」重新出发的起点，我的故乡。
t_en: I have only one mission for you both: Explore and understand this world in your own way, as the place where the Trailblaze began anew, and my homeland.

t_ch: 上面这些话，你们或许会在他人口中听见截然不同的说法。相信你们看见的，选择你们相信的。
t_en: You might hear completely different versions of what I just said from others. Trust what you see with your own eyes, and believe in what you choose to believe.

t_ch: 我相信领航员的指引。
t_en: I trust our Navigator's guidance.

t_ch: 我也是！我可不会让{NICKNAME}一个人走在前面。
t_en: Me too! I won't let {NICKNAME} walk ahead alone.

t_ch: 幻月游戏，真的只是游戏吗？
t_en: Are the Phantasmoon Games really just games?

t_ch: 对啊。胜者竟然可以分享星神的权柄，这真的只是一个简单的游戏吗？
t_en: That puzzles me too. The winner gets to share an Aeon's authority. This can't be just a simple game, can it?

t_ch: 发生什么，我都无所谓。
t_en: Whatever happens, I'm okay with it.

t_ch: 装什么酷哇，你对这场游戏没什么想法的话，我可就行动啦！
t_en: Stop acting all cool! If you don't have any thoughts about the games, I'm gonna act on my own!

t_ch: 看来，你们已经有自己的见解了。这样所有人都有任务在身啦。
t_en: I see you already have your own thoughts on this. In that case, everyone's got a mission to take care of now.

t_ch: 我和瓦尔特也准备去会会真珠了。看看她打算为我们呈上怎样的惊喜。
t_en: Welt and I are going to meet Pearl. We'll see what kind of surprise she has in store for us.

t_ch: 欢迎星穹列车，欢迎星穹列车。
t_en: The Astral Express has arrived. Welcome!

t_ch: 这回真是，隆重的接待感扑面而来！{NICKNAME}，咱们快下车吧。
t_en: Now this is what I call a grand welcome! {NICKNAME}, let's get off the train.

t_ch: 对了，几趟「开拓」之旅下来，本姑娘已经完全理解了……
t_en: Oh right, after a few Trailblazing expeditions, I've totally figured it out...

t_ch: 每一站，我们遇见的第一个人多少沾点惊天大秘密。
t_en: The first person we meet at every stop is somehow involved in some earth-shattering secret.

t_ch: 所以，开门的瞬间，一定要多多留意啊！
t_en: So when the door opens, keep your eyes peeled!

t_ch: 我已联系上仙舟的使团，星期日，我们出发吧。
t_en: I've made contact with the Xianzhou delegation. Sunday, let's head out.

t_ch: 见仙舟人若有需要遵守的礼节，请务必提前告诉我。
t_en: If there is any etiquette I need to follow when meeting Xianzhou people, please let me know in advance.

t_ch: 嗯哼哼~♬
t_en: Hmm hmm~ ♬

t_ch: 不知是重返故地带来的亲切感，还是空气中充满了「欢愉」的氛围，列车长看起来心情不错。
t_en: Perhaps it's the familiar comfort of returning to an old haunt, or the buoyant air suffused with joy... whatever the reason, the conductor seems to be in high spirits.

t_ch: 打算出发了？祝你们玩得愉快。
t_en: Ready to head out? Have fun out there.

t_ch: 听说二相乐园各地都有巨型机甲，真羡慕你们能一睹为快啊。
t_en: I heard there are giant mechs all over Planarcadia. I'm quite jealous you'll get to see them in person.

t_ch: 我们要见的真珠小姐，不也是一位智械吗？
t_en: Isn't Miss Pearl, who we're going to meet, an Intellitron herself?

t_ch: 你不懂，「机器人」和「大机器人」是两码事。
t_en: You don't get it. There's a huge difference between a "robot" and a "GIANT robot."

t_ch: 为了解决燃料危机，星穹列车接受黑天鹅小姐提议，前往「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。可刚到那里，三月就意外陷入昏迷，而我和丹恒降落翁法罗斯的过程也算不上顺利。
t_en: To address the fuel shortage, the Astral Express followed Miss Black Swan's suggestion to travel to Amphoreus, a place known as "The Eternal Land." However, soon after the arrival, March suddenly fell unconscious, and the landing that Dan Heng and I made on Amphoreus was anything but smooth.

t_ch: 绝处逢生后，开拓小队结识了当地的「黄金裔」英雄，并从他们口中得知，支撑世界的泰坦诸神正在腐坏，翁法罗斯的大地遍布伤痕。就这样，逐火之旅的序幕缓缓展开……
t_en: After surviving the crash, the Trailblaze Squad met the local heroes known as the Chrysos Heirs. From them, they learned that the Titans sustaining the world were beginning to decay, and that Amphoreus itself was scarred and broken. Thus began the prologue of the Flame-Chase Journey...

t_ch: 在这场冒险史诗的尽头，我们得知了真相：原来，翁法罗斯处于白厄和昔涟创造的「永劫回归」中。他们的目的很简单：对抗星神，改写世界注定「毁灭」的结局。
t_en: At the end of this epic adventure, we uncovered the truth: Amphoreus was trapped within the "Eternal Recurrence" created by Phainon and Cyrene. Their goal was simple: to defy the Aeon and rewrite the world's fated end of Destruction.

t_ch: 接过白厄的遗志，我们再度踏上轮回，寻找打破结局的办法。先后挫败第一位天才赞达尔和「长夜月」的阴谋后，我们所有人终于得以集结，直面绝灭大君铁墓。
t_en: Carrying on Phainon's legacy, we stepped once more into the cycle, determined to find a way to break free from fate. After thwarting the schemes of Zandar, the First Genius, and Evernight, we finally gathered together to face the Lord Ravager Irontomb.

t_ch: 这场声势浩大的战斗甚至引来了博识尊的注视：黑塔取代铁墓完成自我加冕，绝灭大君陨落；「记忆」的孩子昔涟以自己为代价，换来新世界的种子在银河间扎根……
t_en: The battle was so immense that it even drew the gaze of Nous. Herta took Irontomb's place, completing her self-coronation as the Lord Ravager fell. And Cyrene, the Child of Remembrance, gave her life so that the seeds of a new world could take root among the stars...

t_ch: …就这样，我们为名为「翁法罗斯」的史诗写下了前所未有的浪漫结局，博识尊演算中的「第四时刻」也开始了它的倒计时——
t_en: ...And so, the epic of Amphoreus came to an unprecedented and romantic close. In Nous's extrapolations, the "Fourth Instant" had already begun its countdown...

t_ch: 尽情挥洒着「开拓」的信念，我们以最纯粹的烂漫为这场旅途画上了「。」——而在挥别「永恒之地」之后，星穹列车也将启程前往下一站。
t_en: With the spirit of Trailblaze shining in full, we brought this journey to a close in the purest, most poetic way imaginable. And as we bid farewell to the Eternal Land, the Astral Express set off once more toward its next destination.

t_ch: 这还用问？当然是「十成十」啦。
t_en: Is that even a question? "One hundred percent," of course.

t_ch: 换言之，能活下来的人…一个也没有。
t_en: In other words, there will be... no survivors.

t_ch: 凡是认得我这张脸的，哪怕是躲到天涯海角，小女子也绝不放过。
t_en: Anyone who recognizes my face... I will not let them off even if they hide at the ends of the world.

t_ch: 受贵帮{RUBY_B#老大}龙头{RUBY_E#}所雇，本想破例——但我看，各位是不想领情呐。
t_en: I was willing to make an exception when I was hired by your gang's leader, but I see you folks are not interested in accepting my good will.

t_ch: 不是信不过，但道上的规矩你懂。
t_en: Not that I don't trust you, but you know the rules of the trade.

t_ch: 雇人办事，总得先验验成色。
t_en: When you hire someone to do a job, you gotta see what they're made of first.

t_ch: 都说十王易见，小鬼难缠。但若是小鬼不识抬举，主子怕也自身难保。
t_en: People say that the lords of hell are easy to deal with, but their underlings are the real trouble. If a group's underlings don't know their place, even their masters may not be safe.
